decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, scheduled 2026-06-15T12:00Z) was still stale SCHEDULED in shorts_state.json 11 days past its publish time. Verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, title 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872 #shorts', author Voidline/@voidlinedocs). It auto-published on schedule; state was never updated. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Same publish-side drift pattern as the 2026-06-13 reconcile of 5 Shorts.

PIPELINE BONE-DRY. Today Fri 2026-06-26 is not a publish day; checked next 3 days: Sat 06-27 (empty), Sun 06-28 (LONG-FORM + Reddit-seed day per cadence — NOTHING queued), Mon 06-29 (Shorts day per Mon/Wed/Fri — NOTHING queued). Entire catalogue is now PUBLIC through v1_bonus_briggs (06-15); zero assets staged behind it for 11 days. v4 Roanoke is the next planned topic but was blocked on the Google Flow Nano Banana 2 thumb (submit button disabled, UI redesign — see LEARNINGS 2026-06-13). ACTION NEEDED before Sun 06-28: either unblock v4 Flow thumb (fresh session / new selector path) or ship v4 with the v3 Tunguska placeholder base, render+pre-ship-gate (≥75), and schedule the long-form + draft the r/UnresolvedMysteries seed. Cadence (1 long/wk Sun 17:00 + 2 Shorts/wk) will break this weekend if nothing is produced.
